name: Mom's School Bus

name: Gentle Arms Daily Trnsprtn
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth – Corporations Division (Entity ID 611586557)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record – consistent with intrastate non-emergency medical / elderly transportation. BBB confirms ~20 years in business, ~28 employees, address 6 Cushing Pl, Chelmsford, MA 01824 (Yelp lists same). Services: NEMT, wheelchair, senior transport, adult day-program shuttles. Phones: (978) 244-0199 / (877) 681-0176. Likely passenger-carrier registered with MA DPU rather than FMCSA.

name: Merit Medi Trans
entity_status: Active (per recent reviews/listings 2025-2026); contracted services have been reduced
registry_source: Secondary sources – CA Secretary of State bizfile (CAPTCHA-gated; not directly retrieved); facesof15.com confirms CA incorporation 2004
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under 'Merit Medi Trans' or 'Merit Medi-Trans' – intrastate NEMT / paratransit operator regulated by CA PUC / Medi-Cal. Yuba City office at 1190 Market St (530) 673-1029; HQ / additional office at 1355 E Eaton Rd, Chico, CA 95973; previously also operated in Red Bluff (office closed). Owner Joe Miceli publicly cited CA minimum-wage pressure (Faces of $15 piece) causing layoffs and service cuts. Active per Yelp 2026 reviews. Likely contracts with Butte/Sutter/Yuba counties for Medi-Cal NEMT.

name: Modern Transport
registry_source: FL Sunbiz – no Melbourne-FL 'Modern Transport' located under that exact name
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record for a Florida 'Modern Transport' at 1900 S Harbor City Blvd #328, Melbourne. The only SAFER hit for 'Modern Transport' is a Michigan trucking carrier (USDOT 1626740, Flint MI) and a 'Modern Transport Network LLC' broker in Pflugerville TX (USDOT 2416158 / MC 829973) – neither matches FL HQ or school/wheelchair use case. Address is a suite/mailbox; YellowPages lists 'Modern Transport' at this address but no website, owner, or fleet detail found. Likely intrastate Brevard County NEMT or limo/charter operator; possible suite #328 indicates a mail drop. No Sunbiz entity matched – may operate under a DBA of another FL LLC.

name: Traveling School Bus Intl Inc
registry_source: CA Secretary of State bizfile – not retrievable (CAPTCHA-gated); no match found in public secondary sources
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under 'Traveling School Bus', 'Traveling School Bus Intl', or 'Traveling School Bus International' (likely intrastate / non-vehicle-operating). Listed address 22792 Centre Dr #250, Lake Forest, CA 92630 is a multi-tenant office suite (executive-suite address commonly used as registered-agent/mail address). Charter-bus directories for Lake Forest show no operator under this name. Name pattern suggests a mobile/enrichment-style program rather than a yellow-bus contractor; possibly inactive or suspended CA entity. Phone/website not located.
